info.title: Zendesk
info.description: Comprehensive Zendesk Support connector covering Tickets, Users, Organizations, Groups, Search, Ticket Comments, Satisfaction Ratings, Views, Tags, Ticket Metrics, Help Center / Knowledge Base, SLA Policies, Ticket Attachments, User Identities, Organization Memberships, and Group Memberships via the Zendesk REST API v2. MCP-enabled for Copilot Studio integration.

get.description: Search for tickets, users, organizations, and other objects using Zendesk search syntax.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Zendesk search query (e.g., type:ticket status:open priority:urgent)

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by (created_at, updated_at, priority, status, ticket_type)

get.description: Returns a list of tickets in the account. Returns a maximum of 100 records per page.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by field (id, subject, created_at, updated_at, status, requester, assignee, group)

get.description: Returns a specific ticket by ID.

put.description: Updates a ticket. Can change status, priority, assignee, add comments, and modify tags.

parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ticket to update

delete.description: Soft-deletes a ticket. Requires admin or agent with delete permission.

parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ticket to delete

post.description: Merges one or more tickets into a target ticket. Source tickets are closed.

parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.description: The target ticket ID to merge into

get.description: Returns all comments on a ticket including public and private comments.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order: asc (oldest first) or desc (newest first)

get.description: Returns time metrics for a ticket: first reply time, full resolution time, requester wait time, agent wait time.
Returns related information for a ticket (incidents count, Jira issues, followup sources).
Returns the full audit trail for a ticket, showing all changes and events.
Returns all system and custom ticket fields and their configurations.
Returns a list of users in the account.

post.description: Creates a new user (end-user, agent, or admin).

get.description: Returns a specific user by ID.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The ID of the user to update

get.description: Returns tickets requested by, CC'd to, or assigned to a specific user.
Returns all identities (email addresses, phone numbers, X/Twitter handles) for a user.
Returns a list of organizations in the account.
Returns a specific organization by ID.
Returns tickets for a specific organization.
Returns all organization memberships showing which users belong to which organizations.
Returns all agent groups.
Returns a specific group by ID.
Returns all group memberships showing which agents belong to which groups.
Returns all shared and personal views available to the current user.
Executes a view and returns the tickets it contains.
Returns the ticket count for a view.
Returns satisfaction ratings. Can filter by score and date range.

parameters.name: score
parameters.description: Filter by score (good, bad, offered, unoffered, etc.)

get.description: Returns the most popular recent tags in the account.
Returns available macros (predefined ticket actions).
Returns Help Center articles. Can be filtered by label.

parameters.name: label_names
parameters.description: Comma-separated label names to filter by

get.description: Returns a specific Help Center article by ID including body, labels, and metadata.
Searches Help Center articles by keyword.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter to a specific category ID

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Filter to a specific section ID

parameters.name: label_names
parameters.description: Comma-separated label names to filter by

get.description: Returns Help Center articles in a specific section.

post.description: Creates a new Help Center article in a specific section.

parameters.name: section_id
parameters.description: The section ID to create the article in

draft.description: Whether the article is a draft

get.description: Returns Help Center sections.
Returns Help Center categories.
Returns Help Center sections in a specific category.
Returns all SLA policies and their targets.
Returns a specific SLA policy by ID including filter conditions and metric targets.

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: The ID of the SLA policy

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration. Provides AI agents access to Zendesk Support operations as tools.

tags.name: Help Center
tags.description: Knowledge base articles, sections, and categories

tags.name: SLA Policies
tags.description: Service Level Agreement policies and targets

scopes.hc:read: Read access to Help Center articles
scopes.hc:write: Write access to Help Center articles
